channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9483] sanity-scrub test_9: @@@@@@ FAIL: (11) Got speed 41, expected more than 168
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for parinay <parinay_kondekar@xyratex.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/b9076590-3558-11e7-b0a8-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_9 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

test_log

CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0000.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0001.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0002.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0003.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl lfsck_start -M lustre-MDT0000 -t scrub 8 -s 100 -r
Started LFSCK on the device lustre-MDT0000: scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl lfsck_start -M lustre-MDT0001 -t scrub 8 -s 100 -r
Started LFSCK on the device lustre-MDT0001: scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl lfsck_start -M lustre-MDT0002 -t scrub 8 -s 100 -r
Started LFSCK on the device lustre-MDT0002: scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl lfsck_start -M lustre-MDT0003 -t scrub 8 -s 100 -r
Started LFSCK on the device lustre-MDT0003: scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0000.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0000.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0001.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0001.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0002.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0002.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0003.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0003.oi_scrub |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0000.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0001.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0002.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0003.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.lfsck_speed_limit 300
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_speed_limit 300
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0002.lfsck_speed_limit 300
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0003.lfsck_speed_limit 300
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0000.oi_scrub
CMD: trevis-45vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.lfsck_speed_limit 0
CMD: trevis-45vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-MDT0001.oi_scrub
 sanity-scrub test_9: @@@@@@ FAIL: (11) Got speed 41, expected more than 168
item.summary: sanity-scrub test_9: @@@@@@ FAIL: (11) Got speed 41, expected more than 168

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
